title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners:
Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners!
